fields.title: PwC Cybersecurity Consulting
fields.description: Completed a job simulation involving cybersecurity for PwC Digital Intelligence, gaining experience in understanding and explaining the concept of integrated defense.
fields.mainText:
# Descriptions
- Completed a job simulation involving cybersecurity for PwC Digital
   Intelligence, gaining experience in understanding and explaining the concept
   of integrated defense.
- Developed expertise in integrated defense strategies and their application in
   real-world scenarios.
- Conducted risk assessments and formulated security recommendations for a
   client.
- Demonstrated proficiency in cybersecurity terminology, network segmentation,
   and firewall configuration.
# Skills
- Risk Management Frameworks
- Principles of Defense
- Cause Analysis
- Risk Impact Assessment
- Presentation Prop
- Impact Analysis
- System Security
- Network Security
- Firewall Configuration

# Tasks
1. [Task One: Integrated Information Defense](https://www.hqphu.com/posts/52TCUbylj3Iu9sLMGUmVsg)
2. [Task Two: Risk Assessment](https://www.hqphu.com/posts/2HwauqJTcHxrgzFW7qMRoP)
3. [Task Three: IT System Security Baseline](https://www.hqphu.com/posts/2hGHs2xP0eHUlUhb9BRI1g)
4. [Task Four: Network Segmentation](https://www.hqphu.com/posts/3ZvGKfSWdmzpMl35mBRpBQ)
